# Yukhym (Fima) Rubin | Engineer, Robotics & AI

> 22-year-old software engineer, roboticist, and AI enthusiast.

## Professional Summary
Yukhym (Fima) Rubin is a talented engineer specializing in software development, machine learning, and robotics. He holds expertise in building scalable systems, training AI models, and creating hardware-software integrations.

## Experience
- **Ruby.AI**: Chief Technology Officer - Leading technical strategy and architecture for AI solutions.
- **Telesens**: Software Engineer - Developing and optimizing high-performance software systems.
- **CloudWorks**: Backend Developer - Designing robust API architectures and database structures.

## Key Projects
- **Flappy Bird AI**: An autonomous AI model trained to play Flappy Bird using NEAT algorithms. (https://flappy-bird.fimarubin.com/)
- **Mom Protocol**: A resilient status-tracking website built for his mom to monitor his health. (https://mom-protocol.fimarubin.com)
- **Anti-Spam Bot**: A Telegram bot utilizing advanced filters to detect and block spam/scams with 99% accuracy. (https://t.me/yun_israel_bot)

## Off The Clock
- Hobbies include cooking (Grandma's Borsch, Pasta Carbonara), watching movies (The Dark Knight), playing piano, reading books, and tech destruction (breaking & rebuilding hardware).
- He has an adorable dog named Lizzy.
